name: Brandon Gill
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $73,578 for Brandon Gill in U.S. House, TX-26. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
